sql_code: SELECT (read_clat_p50_ns + write_clat_p50_ns + sync_lat_p50_ns)/1000 as median_latency_us, * EXCLUDE (run_id, scenario_name, benchmark_tool, fio_command, fio_job, fio_error, usr_cpu, sys_cpu, ctx, majf, minf)
r_code: to_svg <- svgstring(width = output.width.inch, height = output.height.inch, scaling = 1)
### the current table is bound to the variable 'df'
output <- ggplot(df, aes(y = median_latency_us, x = backend )) +
plot(output); dev.off(); to_svg() # output to the html page

sql_code: SELECT (read_bw_kib_per_sec + write_bw_kib_per_sec)/1000 as bw_mib_per_sec, * EXCLUDE (run_id, scenario_name, benchmark_tool, fio_command, fio_job, fio_error, usr_cpu, sys_cpu, ctx, majf, minf)
